title: Teaching AI Our Design System

title: The Design System Team Did Real Work. Nobody Could See It.

title: Systematically Not Following the Design System Is a System

title: The Plight of the UXD
summary: A candid explanation of the UX developer role, its ambiguity, and the value of HTML, CSS, and product judgment.

summary: A technical walkthrough of a clipped border rendering bug caused by transforms, browser rounding, and painting behavior.
